zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，空头略占优势
zh.content:
SOL/USD最新报65.86美元，24小时微跌0.48%，日内波动区间较窄，显示市场观望情绪较浓。从价格表现看，当前仍运行于20日均线下方，短期趋势偏弱，资金追涨意愿不足，整体维持震荡偏空格局。

技术指标方面，20日均线位于66.60美元，而现价低于均线约1.1%，表明中短期动能仍受到压制。MACD值为-0.026，处于零轴下方，虽然空头力量不算强烈，但市场尚未出现明确的反转信号。由于RSI数据缺失，超买超卖状态暂时无法确认。

关键位置上，下方初步支撑位关注65.60美元，即日内低点附近；若跌破该区域，价格可能进一步测试65.00美元整数关口。上方阻力位首先看66.35美元，其次是20日均线所在的66.60美元区域，突破后有望改善短期技术结构。

交易策略方面，稳健型投资者可等待价格重新站稳66.60美元并放量突破后再考虑顺势做多。激进交易者则可关注65.60美元支撑的得失情况，若有效跌破可短线跟随空头。当前市场方向性不足，建议控制仓位并严格设置止损，以应对震荡行情带来的反复波动风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is trading at 65.86, remaining below its 20-period simple moving average at 66.60, which suggests short-term bearish pressure is still present. The modest 24-hour decline of 0.48% reflects a market lacking strong directional conviction, while the narrow trading range between 65.60 and 66.35 indicates consolidation. Until price can reclaim and sustain movement above the SMA, momentum is likely to favor sellers or range-bound conditions rather than a strong bullish breakout.

The MACD reading of -0.0263 points to mildly negative momentum. Although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation, the negative MACD value indicates that downside pressure remains slightly stronger than buying interest. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess overbought or oversold conditions. As a result, traders may place greater emphasis on price action around key technical levels and monitor whether momentum indicators begin to improve alongside any recovery attempt.

Immediate support appears near 65.60, the recent session low. A decisive break below this area could expose additional downside toward 65.00 and potentially 64.50. On the upside, the first resistance zone is located around 66.35, followed by the SMA near 66.60. A sustained move above these barriers would improve the technical outlook and could open the path toward the 67.00–68.00 region, where sellers may become more active again.

For short-term traders, patience may be warranted until price either breaks above resistance or confirms a loss of support. Bullish participants could look for a close above 66.60 accompanied by strengthening momentum before considering new long positions. Conversely, bearish traders may view failed rallies into the 66.35–66.60 zone as potential selling opportunities. Given the current consolidation pattern, disciplined risk management and carefully placed stop-loss orders remain especially important.
